name: get (from lodash)
description: A source-faithful extracted bundle of lodash's get method and its required helpers, cut from the full lodash package instead of the standalone lodash.get package.
tagline: Extract lodash get from the monolith with helpers included.
summary: This page ships an extracted bundle from the full lodash package. The point is not to use the modular lodash.get package, but to prove that a monolithic package can be cut down to one vendorable behavior plus its local helper chain.
nativeAlternative: Optional chaining and nullish coalescing cover some cases, but they do not replace dynamic string paths, array-style path parsing, or lodash's exact default value behavior.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization after extraction. The extraction defines the raw bundle; normalization only changes the packaging shape.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Source-faithful extracted bundle from the lodash package, with local helper modules inlined and module boundaries removed.

note: This snippet is the first monolith extraction experiment. It differs from the modular lodash.get package because the raw source is assembled from the full lodash package's internal module graph.
